features: SMOOTH AND NOURISHED SKIN: NIVEA Rose & Almond Oil body cream shower gel offers touchably smooth, soft skin feel that lasts even after towel drying
SKIN PROTECTION FORMULA: This NIVEA body moisturiser shower cream is formulated with vitamin C, E, and precious oils; it pampers and protects skin from drying out
ROSE SCENT: NIVEA moisturising cleansing lotion with delicate Rose fragrance indulges the senses and adds a dose of luxury to any shower and skincare routine
HOW TO APPLY: Simply squeeze a small amount of this shower skin moisturiser onto hands and lather, then massage into wet skin for deeply nourished skin

PLANET AND SKIN CONSCIOUS: NIVEA ensures high-quality, dermatologically approved products to suit various skin types and is a 100% climate-neutralised product, free from microplastics and made from 96% recycled plastic*
description: Product Description NIVEA Rose & Almond Oil Shower Cream - Indulge your senses in this soothing and moisturising shower gel Let the soft lather of this Rose and Almond Oil shower cream nourish your skin with every shower. Infused with vitamin C, E, and precious oils, this indulgent shower gel not only pampers your skin but also shields it from drying out. NIVEA's everyday body wash, enriched with almond oil, leaves your skin feeling revitalised and features a delicate rose scent to indulge your senses. Backed by 130 years of experience, our dedicated researchers continually develop high-quality, dermatologically approved products tailored to meet the diverse needs of all skin types. Application information: Simply massage onto wet skin and rinse off for a refreshing cleanse. Free from microplastics, pH skin-neutral balance, 99% biodegradable formula, and 100% climate-neutralised. Packaged in a bottle made from 96% recycled plastic.* *excluding cap & label Product benefits: Luxurious shower cream for touchably smooth, soft skin feel Formulated with vitamins C, E & precious oils to protect skin from drying out Delicate Rose fragrance and Almond Oil to indulge the senses pH Skin Balanced. Skin compatibility dermatologically approved Microplastic-free & 96% recycled plastic Ingredients Aqua,Sodium Laureth Sulfate,Cocamidopropyl Betaine,PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate,Glycerin,Glyceryl Glucoside,Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil,Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder,Sodium Chloride,Polyquaternium-7,PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil,Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer,Citric Acid,PEG-200 Hydrogenated Glyceryl Palmate,Glyceryl Stearate SE,Sodium Benzoate,Benzyl Alcohol,Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone,Coumarin,Parfum Safety Warning Avoid contact with eye area. Box Contains 6x Nivea Caring Shower Gel Cream Indulgent Moisture Rose 500ml See more
